title: KandyToys 120cm Dual Line Blue Frameless Parafoil Stunt Kite
description: 120cm Parafoil Stunt Kite Twin Line This twin line kite is perfect for all levels of experience. This dual line power kite is great fun to fly. It is an easily controlled stunt kite using two lines and is ideal for beginners to learn power kite flying. Provides a brilliant, fun flying experience in a variety of wind conditions. The nylon sail comes ready to fly, complete with 2 control lines and two handles. Folds neatly away after use as there is no frame, so is easily carried when travelling. Handy kite storage bag included
